meta.title: Res Publica
meta.description: A civic organization for democracy, responsibility, dialogue, research, and public participation.

hero.title: The public matter belongs to everyone.
hero.lede: Res Publica connects democracy, responsibility, and research — creating spaces where dialogue becomes participation.

items.title: Democracy
items.text: We strengthen democratic institutions and practices through education, analysis, and public debate.

items.title: Dialogue
items.text: We bring people with different perspectives together — respectfully, openly, and as equals.

items.title: Research
items.text: We work evidence-based: independent research is the foundation of our positions and projects.

cta.title: Take part.
cta.text: Public participation begins with a first step. Write to us.

partners.title: Partners
partners.lede: We work with organizations that share our values.

contact.title: Contact
contact.lede: Write to us — we usually reply within a few days.

form.name: Name
form.successText: Your message has been recorded. We will get back to you.
form.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

home.notFoundText: The requested page does not exist or has been moved.

projects.title: Projects
projects.lede: Concrete initiatives that make participation possible.

research.title: Research
research.lede: Independent analysis as the foundation of our work.

publications.title: Publications
publications.lede: Reports, papers, and statements — freely available.

events.title: Events
events.lede: Places of dialogue: upcoming and past dates.

footer.tagline: For democracy, responsibility, and public participation.

search.lede: Search news, projects, research, publications, and events.
